name: local-video-tiler
description: A local desktop app to view and listen to downloaded video files in a fully customizable, tiling-window-manager style layout.
author: Local-Video-Tiler

scripts.lint: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check scripts/win-launcher.js
scripts.launcher:win: npm install --no-save pkg@5.8.1 && npx pkg scripts/win-launcher.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output Launch.exe
